name: academorix/chargeback
purpose: Chargeback lifecycle — Chargeback + ChargebackEvidence aggregates with evidence-bundle submission and dispute state tracking.
capabilities: Chargeback aggregate (cbk_ prefix) — per-tenant dispute root
when_to_use: A tenant receives a chargeback from a payment provider and must respond with evidence.
when_not_to_use: For refunds initiated by the tenant, use academorix/refund. For payment disputes pre-chargeback, use academorix/payment.
